title: 日本ダービーの後に・疲弊の理由

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has managed to enter and run the
Japanese Derby, but she's hit with extreme
fatigue after the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At 2,400 meters, it's a tough G1 race. Doubts
about her distance aptitude start to rise after the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, the last of the Classic Triple
Crown races, is even longer than today's race. A
new problem has reared its ugly head.
